title: Sticky Header

statement.markdown:
## Task
Create a sticky header that remains visible at the top of the page as the user scrolls down and up.
### Requirements
1. The header should be fixed to the top of the viewport.
2. The header should remain visible even after scrolling down the page.
3. The header should go back to its normal position when the user scrolls back up to the top.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling
Create a sticky header that is at least 50px in height
